rationale: Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-3036; proactive spec-rollout to remove validation, driver not doing anything wrong previously.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2926; proactive addition of new BSON Binary Vector Subtype support.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-1541; proactive spec-rollout to add KMS retry behavior.
TLS InsecureSkipVerify affecting unrelated connection options; implementation bug with no specific contradicted spec rule.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2822; proactive spec-rollout to add sort option to update operations.
Go-specific multi-wrapped error unwrap bug; no spec-defined behavior for error wrapping patterns.
v1.17.2 regression in UnmarshalBSONValue for null types; internal API behavior change, not contradicting BSON spec rule.
Issue split DRIVERS-3097; updating JSON spec tests for Binary Vector Subtype, not fixing driver behavior.
ExtJSON output for Regex has unescaped double quotes, producing invalid JSON; violates BSON ExtJSON spec validity requirement.
Go-language error handling modernization (errors.Is/As support in BSON APIs); no spec-defined error interface requirement.
Go-language error handling modernization (errors.Is/As support in public APIs); internal API ergonomics, no spec requirement.
Improving fuzzing coverage and enabling race detector; CI/test tooling improvement, no spec behavior involved.
Replacing specific error constants with InvalidArgumentError type; API ergonomics refactor, no spec requirement.
Go driver omits TopologyDescriptionChangedEvent on close; explicitly notes .NET and Node publish it; SDAM spec requires the event.
Improving nil error messages with InvalidArgumentError; API ergonomics improvement, no spec-defined error format requirement.
Expired TLS certificate for go.mongodb.org vanity domain; infrastructure/build issue, no spec behavior involved.
BSON encoding performance regression (4x slower in v2 vs v1); internal performance issue, no spec-defined behavior violated.
Improving EOF error message clarity for users; user-facing message improvement, no spec-defined error message format.
Connection liveness check only runs when maxIdleTimeMS is set (unintended); implementation bug, no specific CMAP spec rule violated.
v2 BSON Decode behavior differs from v1 for pre-populated slices; internal API regression, not contradicting BSON spec rule.
GridFS spec requires _id field to be populated; v2 missing UnmarshalBSON causes _id to be nil after bucket.Find().Decode().
Adding license checks to pre-commit hook; CI/dev tooling improvement, no spec behavior involved.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-1815; proactive spec-rollout to add TransientTransactionError label to PoolClearedError.
Go global http.DefaultTransport used instead of creating client per-use; Go-specific implementation bug, no spec requirement.
Reverting bufio in BSON valueReader to fix CPU/memory performance regression vs v1; internal performance issue, no spec rule.
Duplicate entry; reverting bufio in BSON valueReader for performance; internal optimization, no spec-defined behavior.
CSOT spec requires error when maxAwaitTimeMS >= timeoutMS for tailable cursors; only Watch() validates, not Find()/Aggregate().
Flaky prose test for command logging truncation size; CI test reliability issue, not driver spec behavior.
Panic from negative slice bounds in bsoncoreutil.Truncate during BulkWrite logging; implementation crash, no spec rule violated.
Automating benchmarks to post PR comparison comments; CI/developer tooling improvement, no spec behavior involved.
Updating expected error string in LangChainGo integration test; third-party integration test update, no spec relevance.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2798; proactive spec-rollout to fix cluster time gossiping from monitoring connections.
CSOT spec requires timeoutMS to apply to full cursor.Next() call; driver blocks indefinitely ignoring client-level timeout.
100% CPU usage during server selection when no servers available; implementation performance bug, no specific spec rule violated.
bypassEmptyTsReplacement parameter missing from v2 API that existed in v1; v1-to-v2 API parity issue, not a cross-language spec.
Govulncheck fails due to Go stdlib CVEs; dependency/security upgrade, no spec behavior involved.
Replacing golang/snappy with klauspost/compress/snappy; dependency swap, no spec behavior change.
Search index creation fails in v2 when Options is nil; v2 regression bug, not a cross-language spec conformance issue.
Issue split DRIVERS-3282; adding optin setting to unified test runner for MinPoolSize population, test runner enhancement.
Issue split DRIVERS-3106; extending unified test runner to support auto encryption tests, not fixing driver behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-3357; search index spec test compatibility fix for Local Atlas Docker, test infrastructure update.
Removing unnecessary setter methods from internal mongocrypt options package; internal refactor, no behavior change.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2782; proactive spec-rollout to expose atClusterTime in snapshot sessions API.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-3192; proactive spec-rollout to add mongo.com to OIDC allowed hosts list.
Heap out-of-bounds read in GSSAPI C bindings; memory safety bug in implementation, not a spec-defined behavior deviation.
Command Logging spec requires commitTransaction/abortTransaction to be logged; driver fails to propagate logger to those operations.
Moving IsTransactionRunning/TransactionState from x/ package to public Session API; ergonomics improvement, no spec requirement.
Variable shadowing causing connection leak and deferred cancel accumulation in rttMonitor; implementation bug, no spec rule.
Issue split DRIVERS-3380; adding spec tests for server deprioritization with changed ServerDescription, test infrastructure update.
Unmarshal silently succeeds when decoding int32 into bson.Raw; Go-specific API behavior, no BSON spec rule on this case.
bufio 4096-byte limit causes failure for long field names in cursor.Decode; implementation bug with hardcoded buffer size.
